source.name: Los Angeles event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: Major League Cricket Matches
events.description: Major League Cricket comes to Los Angeles from July 1–3, with the Los Angeles Knight Riders hosting world-class T20 cricket at Fairplex in Pomona. Fans can expect five days of fast-paced cricket, family entertainment, food, music, and a first look at the future home of cricket in LA. Special ticket offers, group discounts, family packages, and community part

events.title: Nana with Kennyflowers / Airplane James / Devon Paulix / Kacey Lynch
Major League Cricket Matches
events.description: Major League Cricket comes to Los Angeles from July 4–5, with the Los Angeles Knight Riders hosting world-class T20 cricket at Fairplex in Pomona. Fans can expect five days of fast-paced cricket, family entertainment, food, music, and a first look at the future home of cricket in LA. Special ticket offers, group discounts, family packages, and community part

events.title: Hollywood Bowl July 4th Fireworks Spectacular 2026 with The Beach Boys (July 3)
events.description: Kick off Independence Day weekend on July 3, 2026 at the Hollywood Bowl's July Fourth Fireworks Spectacular. The Beach Boys join the Hollywood Bowl Orchestra for classic hits, capped by a huge fireworks show the whole family will love.

events.title: Santa Monica 4th of July Parade 2026 on Main Street
events.description: Join Santa Monica's beloved free Fourth of July Parade on Main Street, returning Saturday, July 4, 2026 at 9:30 am. Presented by the Ocean Park Association, this family-friendly tradition fills the street with floats, music and community spirit.

events.title: Major League Cricket Matches
events.description: Major League Cricket comes to Los Angeles from July 4–5, with the Los Angeles Knight Riders hosting world-class T20 cricket at Fairplex in Pomona. Fans can expect five days of fast-paced cricket, family entertainment, food, music, and a first look at the future home of cricket in LA. Special ticket offers, group discounts, family packages, and community part

events.title: AmericaFest 2026 at the Rose Bowl: Pasadena's July 4th Fireworks Celebration
events.description: AmericaFest returns to Pasadena's Rose Bowl Stadium on July 4, 2026 for one of America's largest Independence Day celebrations. Families can enjoy a Family Fun Zone opening at 1 pm, live music and freestyle motocross, capped by the West Coast's largest fireworks display. Tickets start at $20.

events.title: Gloria Molina Grand Park's Summer Block Party
events.description: LA County's largest free Fourth of July celebration: a free block party with global beats, live arts, food trucks, the Grand Park Ferris Wheel, and a spectacular drone light show finale in the heart of downtown LA. All ages, pets welcome.
events.sourceName: Gloria Molina Grand Park's Summer Block Party (July 4)

events.title: Grand Park 4th of July Block Party 2026: Free Downtown LA Festival & Drone Show
events.description: Celebrate the Fourth of July 2026 at Downtown Los Angeles' largest free Independence Day festival in Gloria Molina Grand Park. Families can enjoy live music, food trucks, a Ferris wheel, kids' art activities and a dazzling drone light show from 4 to 9:30 pm. No ticket needed.

events.title: Good Old Blues LIVE!
events.description: Live music performance by Robert Dean every 1st and 3rd Saturday of each month from 7:00PM to 9:00PM. No cover, donations are welcome. Some refreshments and snack will be available.

events.title: Hollywood Bowl July 4th Fireworks Spectacular 2026 with The Beach Boys
events.description: Celebrate the Fourth of July 2026 at the Hollywood Bowl with The Beach Boys and the Hollywood Bowl Orchestra. This family-favorite July 4th tradition ends with a spectacular fireworks finale under the Los Angeles night sky.

events.title: Long Beach 4th of July Fireworks 2026: Sea to Shining LBC Coastal Finale
events.description: Long Beach celebrates America's 250th on July 4, 2026 with a free fireworks finale at 9 pm along the coastline. Spread a blanket at the Downtown Waterfront, Junipero Beach or Granada Beach for this 20-minute family fireworks show, with no tickets or gates required.
events.venue: Long Beach Coastline (Downtown Waterfront / Junipero Beach / Granada Beach)

events.title: Marina del Rey 4th of July Fireworks 2026 Over the Main Channel
events.description: Watch Marina del Rey light up the sky on July 4th, 2026 with a 20-minute fireworks show launched from a barge on the Main Channel. This free, family-friendly Independence Day tradition is best viewed from Burton Chace Park and waterfront spots beginning at 9 pm.
events.venue: Burton W. Chace Park / Main Channel

events.title: What is Art?
events.description: Free, community educational lecture/discussion. Everyone is welcome to join in and discover many souces of inspirations to create. Hellada Gallery believes that Art pushes our society, our economy, and our communities forward. “What is Art?” gatherings have been offered every week since June 2017.

events.title: Secret Island Comedy Night
events.description: Welcome to Comedy Night at Secret Island Tiki Restaurant and Lounge! Get ready for a night full of laughter and good vibes with our talented lineup of comedians. events.title: OPEN MIC NIGHT
events.description: Musicians & Poets! Come on down to the Grand Annex on the second Thursday of each month for Open Mic Night! To perform: Sign up at 6:30 PM. The first 12 sign-ups are guaranteed to perform, with additional artists as time allows. Plan to do 2 songs/poems (limit stage time to under 8 minutes). LA Pet Fair
events.description: At the La Pet Fair, we’re dedicated to working with reputable breeders and other vendors to bring you access to a wide variety of exotic pets. events.title: RailGiants Train Museum July 2026
events.description: RailGiants Train Museum at the Los Angeles County Fairgrounds in Pomona, California is a historical journey back to the glory days of the American Railroad. Our Museum houses some of the country’s most well-preserved locomotives, which includes several sole survivors of their respective classes. events.title: Fairplex Garden Railroad Jul. 2026
events.description: The Fairplex Garden Railroad is open to the public on the second Sunday of each month from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m. (weather permitting). This is a great opportunity to see the features of the railroad at your own pace. Docents will be available to answer questions.
